definitions.text: Domesticated animal of the species Bos taurus (cows, bulls, steers, oxen etc), and other hoofed mammals of the genus Bos.
examples: Many cattle were suffering from a disease called BSE.

definitions.text: Certain other livestock, such as sheep, pigs or goats. Also rarely applied to horses.
Ellipsis of cattle truck (“to fuck: to break, destroy”).
